observation.user_message: The Payment gateway is timed out!
observation.logs: [CRITICAL] Redis_Cache_Node_01 unreachable. Session state cannot be retrieved.

red_herrings.reset_payment_api: [IMPACT] The payment API was restarted, but it immediately stalled trying to reach the dead Redis cache.

observation.user_message: Users can't upload avatars, the image UI is totally broken!
observation.logs: [ERROR] AWS S3 AccessDenied: Bucket policy missing s3:PutObject for IAM role.

red_herrings.restart_image_ui_service: [IMPACT] The Image UI service restarted, but AWS is still rejecting the upload requests.

observation.user_message: Search is broken, it just says '0 items found' for everything!
observation.logs: [FATAL] Elasticsearch JVM OutOfMemoryError. Node dropped from cluster.

red_herrings.redeploy_search_frontend: [IMPACT] Frontend redeployed successfully, but queries to the backend still return no results.

observation.user_message: Nobody is getting their password reset emails!
observation.logs: [429] SendGrid SMTP rate limit exceeded. Account throttled.

red_herrings.restart_email_worker_pod: [IMPACT] Email worker pod restarted. It immediately hit the SendGrid rate limit again.

observation.user_message: The login page is completely blank white!
observation.logs: [ERROR] Cloudflare CDN Edge serving 502 Bad Gateway due to origin connection timeout.

red_herrings.restart_login_ui_container: [IMPACT] Login UI container bounced, but Cloudflare still cannot reach the origin.

observation.user_message: All the admin dashboard graphs are empty!
observation.logs: [PANIC] Prometheus TSDB WAL corruption detected. Halting data ingestion.

red_herrings.restart_grafana_dashboard: [IMPACT] Grafana restarted, but the underlying Prometheus datastore is still corrupted.

observation.user_message: The iOS app is crashing instantly on startup!
observation.logs: [ERROR] API Gateway quota exhausted for tenant_id: ios_client_v2.

red_herrings.rollback_ios_build: [IMPACT] iOS build rolled back in TestFlight, but the API Gateway is still rejecting all traffic.

observation.user_message: Video playback is buffering forever!
observation.logs: [FATAL] Transcoder_Node_04 kernel panic. Segment generation stalled.

red_herrings.reset_video_player_cdn: [IMPACT] CDN edge cache cleared, but the transcoder is still dead, so no new chunks are being created.

observation.user_message: When I click 'Save Profile', it just spins endlessly!
observation.logs: [WARN] RabbitMQ Queue 'profile_updates' reached max capacity (100,000). Rejecting writes.

red_herrings.restart_profile_web_service: [IMPACT] Profile web service restarted, but it immediately hung waiting on the full RabbitMQ queue.

observation.user_message: Live chat is delayed by like 5 minutes!
observation.logs: [ERROR] HAProxy websocket timeout parameter mismatch. Connections dropping.

red_herrings.restart_chat_backend: [IMPACT] Chat backend pods restarted, but HAProxy is still severing the persistent websocket connections.

observation.user_message: Checkout is giving a 500 internal server error!
observation.logs: [FATAL] Stripe Webhook HMAC signature verification failed. Secrets mismatch.

red_herrings.restart_checkout_service: [IMPACT] Checkout service bounced, but the webhook signatures are still failing validation.

observation.user_message: My shopping cart just randomly empties itself!
observation.logs: [INFO] Memcached LRU eviction rate spiked to 90%. Active session keys destroyed.

red_herrings.patch_shopping_cart_logic: [IMPACT] Cart logic hotfixed, but Memcached is still evicting sessions due to memory pressure.

observation.user_message: All the PDF download links are throwing 404s!
observation.logs: [ERROR] NFS mount /mnt/documents detached on worker nodes. Path not found.

red_herrings.restart_download_api: [IMPACT] Download API restarted, but the NFS volume containing the actual PDFs is still unmounted.

observation.user_message: New users can't register, it says 'Service Unavailable'!
observation.logs: [FATAL] PostgreSQL max_connections (500) reached. Rejecting new connections.

red_herrings.restart_registration_service: [IMPACT] Registration service restarted, but the database connection pool is still maxed out.

observation.user_message: The website looks like it's from 1995, no CSS is loading!
observation.logs: [ERROR] S3 CORS policy missing Access-Control-Allow-Origin. Browser blocking assets.

red_herrings.redeploy_frontend_assets: [IMPACT] Frontend assets recompiled and pushed, but browsers are still blocking them due to CORS.

observation.user_message: No one is getting their 2FA text messages!
observation.logs: [ERROR] Twilio API Response: 402 Payment Required. Account balance zero.

red_herrings.restart_sms_worker: [IMPACT] SMS worker restarted, but API requests to Twilio are still returning a 402 error.

observation.user_message: The marketing analytics stopped tracking page views completely!
observation.logs: [WARN] Kafka topic 'page_views' accidentally deleted. Producers failing to write.

red_herrings.restart_analytics_dashboard: [IMPACT] Dashboard reloaded, but there is still no Kafka topic to pull metrics from.

observation.user_message: Invoices are generating with tomorrow's date!
observation.logs: [ERROR] NTP sync failed on invoice worker node, system clock drifted by +14 hours.

red_herrings.patch_invoice_date_logic: [IMPACT] Invoice date formatting patched, but the underlying server clock is still 14 hours in the future.

observation.user_message: I can't access the admin panel, it says 'Connection Refused'!
observation.logs: [CRITICAL] AWS Client VPN Endpoint cert expired. Terminating secure tunnels.

red_herrings.restart_admin_panel: [IMPACT] Admin panel application restarted on the backend, but the VPN tunnel is still dead.

observation.user_message: Creating a support ticket times out after 60 seconds!
observation.logs: [ERROR] Zendesk API token expired. Authentication failed.

red_herrings.restart_ticket_service: [IMPACT] Ticket service bounced, but it is still failing to authenticate with Zendesk.
